name: docs / install-command
trimmed_html:
gadgetkit docs
Getting started API Reference FAQ
Getting started

Install the library from npm and initialize a client.

npm install gadgetkit

Then create a client with your key:

const gk = require('gadgetkit');
const client = gk.init({ key: process.env.GK_KEY });
raw_html:
gadgetkit docs
Getting started API Reference FAQ
Getting started

Install the library from npm and initialize a client.

npm install gadgetkit

Then create a client with your key:

const gk = require('gadgetkit');
const client = gk.init({ key: process.env.GK_KEY });

name: docs / api-reference

gadgetkit docs
Getting started API Reference FAQ
Getting started

Install the library from npm and initialize a client.

npm install gadgetkit

Then create a client with your key:

const client = gk.init({ key: process.env.GK_KEY });
raw_html:
gadgetkit docs
Getting started API Reference FAQ
Getting started

Install the library from npm and initialize a client.

npm install gadgetkit

Then create a client with your key:

const gk = require('gadgetkit');
const client = gk.init({ key: process.env.GK_KEY });

<!doctype html>
<html><head><title>c</title></head><body> <button class="buy" data-p="XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX…" data-av-id="1">Buy A</button>  </body></html>
